footer.byTeam: by the Paths Games Dev Team

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body: This Privacy Policy describes how Paths Games collects, uses and protects your personal information. We may collect basic usage data through anonymised analytics. No personal data is sold to third parties. For any inquiries, contact us via our GitHub repository.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.body: By accessing Paths Games you agree to the following terms. All game content, stories, artwork and code are the intellectual property of Paths Games unless otherwise stated. You agree not to misuse the service or attempt unauthorised access. The game is provided as-is during the development phase.

cookies.title: Cookies Policy
cookies.body: This site uses essential cookies only to keep your session active. No tracking cookies are used.
